Get in Touch

Tell us about your project and we will send you a free quote within 24 hours.

Let’s Work Together

Whether you need a single transcript or ongoing captioning for your entire media library, AccuType is here to help. Fill out the form and we will respond within one business day with a detailed quote and estimated delivery timeline.

Email

Website

File Upload

Share links from Google Drive, Dropbox, YouTube, or upload directly through our form. We support files up to 5 GB.

Confidentiality

All files and communications are encrypted and handled under strict NDAs. Your data is safe with AccuType.
